message:
🌱 Add fsnotify dependency for kubeconfig file watching

Add fsnotify to enable real-time kubeconfig change detection and
automatic UI updates when cluster contexts are renamed.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -3,6 +3,7 @@ module github.com/kubestellar/console
 go 1.23
 
 require (
+	github.com/fsnotify/fsnotify v1.9.0
 	github.com/gofiber/contrib/websocket v1.3.2
 	github.com/gofiber/fiber/v2 v2.52.5
 	github.com/golang-jwt/jwt/v5 v5.2.1
